name: West African Lemony Chicken-Okra Soup
recipeIngredient: Broiler chicken, boneless and skinless (about 2 1/2 lbs)
2 cups sliced okra (or 1 can 15 oz. okra, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the broiler-fryer chicken into pieces.
2. If using canned okra, drain it well.
3. Rub lemon juice over the chicken pieces.
4. Place the chicken in a large pot with the chicken broth or water.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and cook slowly, covered, for 12 minutes.
7. Add the remaining ingredients and continue cooking slowly for about 30 minutes, until the chicken and rice are tender.
8. Remove the chicken pieces and debone them.
9. Cut the meat into small pieces and return it to the pot.
10. Serve 4 to 6 people.
